lines.speaker: Camarst
lines.text: Welcome my friend to the Old Nite! What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Camarst
lines.text: Of course I do! I can offer you a big tasty beer, yours for only two coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh dear, I don't seem to have enough money.

lines.speaker: Camarst
lines.text: No worries, there's a bank just around the corner if you want to grab some coin.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Your pub looks a bit rough.

lines.speaker: Camarst
lines.text: It's all part of the aesthetic! Adventurers who've just returned from the fight of their lives don't want a fancy la-de-da establishment like you'd find down south.

lines.speaker: Camarst
lines.text: They want somewhere to relax and have some hearty ale.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And that's what you offer with your broken tables and glass covered floors?

lines.speaker: Camarst
lines.text: Aye it is, because here at the Old Nite, your safety is our lowest priority!
